data.title: RED: Write structural tests for commands.format_check in gate-2b and gate-2d
data.description:
## testing_mode: RED

Add structural boundary tests verifying gate-2b and gate-2d will read commands.format_check.

## Tests to add to tests/scripts/test-gate-format-check.sh (new file) or appropriate existing test file

1. test_gate2b_reads_format_check_from_config: gate-2b-blast-radius.sh must contain CMD_FORMAT_CHECK or _FORMAT_CHECK_EVIDENCE variable referencing commands.format_check config key
2. test_gate2d_reads_format_check_from_config: same for gate-2d-dependency-check.sh
3. test_gate2b_warn_when_format_check_absent: gate-2b-blast-radius.sh must contain a [DSO WARN] path for absent commands.format_check
4. test_gate2d_warn_when_format_check_absent: same for gate-2d-dependency-check.sh
5. test_gate2b_evidence_appended_on_failure: gate-2b emits_signal with format check evidence when format check fails — structural grep for _FORMAT_CHECK_EVIDENCE or similar
6. test_gate2d_evidence_appended_on_failure: same for gate-2d

## Files to create/modify
- tests/scripts/test-gate-format-check.sh (new)

## Acceptance criteria
- All 6 tests exist and fail (RED) before implementation tasks run
- Tests use structural grep assertions consistent with existing test files
- Tests pass after Tasks 2 and 3 GREEN implementation
